name: voice-note-intake
description: Processes a raw WhatsApp voice note transcript (Hinglish OK) through the voice-note-transcriber agent to clean it up, then feeds the cleaned notes into the full process-meeting workflow. Supports manual trigger and future WhatsApp webhook integration.
